channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Pro-AI super PAC keeps $31M ready for the midterms
item.description: With millions of dollars in AI super PAC accounts, the industry's influence in the midterms is on track to expand.

item.title: Trump issues stark warning about U.S. election security: 4 key points
item.description: President Trump portrayed American elections as vulnerable to foreign interference during a Thursday night address.

item.title: Wildfire smoke turns summer into a new smoky season
item.description: Toronto pedestrians navigate orange skies as wildfire smoke drifts into the city, signaling a recurring seasonal hazard.

item.title: Trump renews threat to revoke TV licenses after networks skip his speech
item.description: President Trump threatened to revoke broadcast licenses of ABC and NBC after they chose not to interrupt regular programming for his remarks.
